problem.zh: 寵物醫療需支援連鎖經營的多層組織與後續中控、獸醫端產品。
problem.en: Pet healthcare needed multi-tier franchise architecture and future admin/vet products.

solution.zh: 規劃中控總部、連鎖總部、院區三層商業架構，並預先開發 App 及 Server。
solution.en: Planned three-tier business model and pre-built app/server foundation.

text.zh: 從單一「寵物醫院」概念，規劃三層商業架構（中控總部／連鎖總部／院區）
text.en: Planned three-tier architecture: central HQ, franchise HQ, clinics

text.zh: App 及 Server 預先開發（Cloud Run；TestFlight / Play Console 內測）
text.en: Pre-built app and server on Cloud Run; TestFlight / internal testing
